# Copilot Instructions

## Skills loading

Before responding to any prompt, check the available skills in `.agents/skills/`. If a skill appears relevant to the task, load it using `read_file` on its `SKILL.md` and follow its instructions.

## README.md update

When making notable changes to the repository, ensure that the `README.md` file is updated to reflect any new features, changes, or important information about the project. Read the `README.md` to see if the change impacts any of the content, and if so, update it accordingly.
